seoTitle: Scalable and Cheap AI API Blog | dryapi
seoDescription: Playbooks for cheap, scalable AI APIs: pricing, routing, caching, guardrails, and production reliability.

hero.heading: Scalable, Cheap AI API Playbooks
hero.body: Technical guides on AI API pricing, multi-provider routing, caching, and reliability so you can scale usage without burning margin.

sections.title: What You Will Learn
sections.body: Every article is designed for commercial AI API operators focused on lower unit cost, better uptime, and faster integration for customers.

cards.title: Cost Optimization Playbooks
cards.description: Token economics, GPU utilization, and margin guardrails you can implement this week.

cards.title: Scalable API Architecture
cards.description: Routing, fallback, and rate-limit patterns for multi-tenant AI API products.

cards.title: Implementation Guides
cards.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint design, auth, billing, and observability checklists.

sections.title: How We Build These Articles
sections.body: Content is based on practical AI API operations: pricing experiments, routing outcomes, and production support patterns across real workloads.

cards.title: Operator-Led Analysis
cards.description: We focus on measurable outcomes: p95 latency, provider cost, and gross margin by route.

cards.title: Developer-Ready Patterns
cards.description: Examples prioritize OpenAI-compatible APIs and minimal migration overhead.

cards.title: Commercial Relevance
cards.description: Every guide maps technical choices to pricing, retention, and support impact.
